title: Portable Context Control Plane — ModelSelectorOutput
description: [FUTURE-ONLY] Schema for the structured output produced by a model-assisted selector during Phase 6 fan-out. A model-assisted selector produces a ModelSelectorOutput containing an array of ProposalDecision records — one per component it evaluated. This schema is intentionally separate from schemas/internal/selection-decision.schema.json because SelectionDecision contains orchestrator-owned fields (traceRefs, constraintsApplied, budgetHint, etc.) that a model must never generate. Model proposals are inputs to the Conflict Resolver only; the Orchestrator converts ProposalDecision records into SelectionDecision records before passing them to the Conflict Resolver. This resolves OQ-2 from docs/19_MODEL_ASSISTED_SELECTOR_SCOPING.md. No field from this schema may be added to any MVP schema without a separate explicit schema decision pass. Canonical: docs/19_MODEL_ASSISTED_SELECTOR_SCOPING.md §8; docs/13_MODEL_ASSISTED_CONTEXT_PLANNING.md §12.
$comment: [FUTURE-ONLY] Phase P8 — Model-Assisted Selector Schema (docs/19 OQ-2 resolution). Created under schemas/future/ to preserve MVP Non-Interference Guarantee (docs/13 §2). SelectionAction, SelectionPath, and SelectionConfidence enum values are inlined (not $ref to enums.shared.schema.json) because future-harness-ajv.ts must not load schemas/shared/ — this mirrors the established pattern in analyzer-output.schema.json. Inline values are exact copies of the canonical enums (docs/06 §4; enums.shared.schema.json). If the canonical enums gain new values, this schema must be updated in a coupled pass. additionalProperties is false on both the root object and ProposalDecision — no undocumented fields are accepted.

selectorName.description: [FUTURE-ONLY] Name identifying the model-assisted selector that produced this output (e.g., 'model_assisted_skill', 'model_assisted_tool'). Must use the naming convention 'model_assisted_<scope>' from docs/19 §9. Required. Canonical: docs/19 §9; docs/13 §16.

proposals.description: [FUTURE-ONLY] Array of ProposalDecision records produced by the model-assisted selector. One entry per component evaluated. May be empty if the model evaluated no components (e.g., all components were already decided by Priority 0–4 rules before reaching the model). The Orchestrator must validate this array against this schema before converting entries to SelectionDecision records. Canonical: docs/19 §8; docs/13 §12.

componentId.description: [FUTURE-ONLY] The registry component ID this proposal applies to. Must match a known, non-quarantined component in the candidate set. Quarantined components never reach any selector (docs/19 §6 Prohibition 6). Required. Canonical: docs/19 §6; docs/06 §4.

action.description: [FUTURE-ONLY] The model's proposed action for this component. Inline enum — values are identical to SelectionAction (docs/06 §4; enums.shared.schema.json#SelectionAction). A model-proposed 'omit' for a safety-critical, never-omit, or alwaysInclude component is unconditionally defeated by the Conflict Resolver (Priority 1–2). Required. Canonical: docs/19 §5; docs/06 §4.

confidence.description: [FUTURE-ONLY] Model confidence in this proposal. Inline enum — values are identical to SelectionConfidence (docs/06 §4; enums.shared.schema.json#SelectionConfidence). Low confidence must trigger fail-open expansion (include) in the Orchestrator — a low-confidence 'omit' proposal must be treated as insufficient evidence (ladder step 8) and overridden to include. Required. Canonical: docs/19 §6 Prohibition 4; docs/06 §4.

reason.description: [FUTURE-ONLY] Human-readable rationale for this proposal. Must not contain raw component content, raw history turn content, or raw user message text. Required for auditability. Canonical: docs/13 §12; docs/06 §4.

evidence.description: [FUTURE-ONLY] Structured signal atoms that justify this proposal. Must be non-empty for any 'omit' or 'defer' proposal (a model-proposed omit with empty evidence[] must be rejected by the Orchestrator). Evidence items are coded atoms and must not contain raw component content or raw user message text. Required. Canonical: docs/13 §12; docs/06 §4.

path.description: [FUTURE-ONLY] The decision ladder path the model used to produce this proposal. Inline enum — values are identical to SelectionPath (docs/06 §4; enums.shared.schema.json#SelectionPath). Must be consistent with the action value (e.g., 'safe_to_omit_match' is only valid with action: 'omit'). The Orchestrator verifies path/action consistency before accepting the proposal. Required. Canonical: docs/19 §8; docs/06 §4; docs/12 §6.1.
